results.rendered_html:
āvartin a.
1 Whirling or turning upon itself, returning; ābrahmabhuvanāllokāḥ punarāvartino'rjuna  Bg. 8. 16 ; kālāṃtarāvarti  H. 1. 207. 
2 Melting, mixing &c.
— m.
— (rtī) A horse having curls of hair on various parts of the body (considered as a sign of auspiciousness).
— nī
1 A whirlpool.
2 N. of a plant (ajaśṛṃgī).
